'''âl-j-r-y''' ('''kalajreyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alluminate|alluminate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alluminate|alluminate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-j-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kalajreyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilajreyoko|thilajreyoko]] || [[word:jilajreyoko|jilajreyoko]] || [[word:shilajreyoko|shilajreyoko]] || [[word:kilajreyoko|kilajreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulajreyoko|thuthulajreyoko]] || [[word:jujulajreyoko|jujulajreyoko]] || [[word:shushulajreyoko|shushulajreyoko]] || [[word:kukulajreyoko|kukulajreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulajreyoko|thulajreyoko]] || [[word:julajreyoko|julajreyoko]] || [[word:shulajreyoko|shulajreyoko]] || [[word:kulajreyoko|kulajreyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulajreyoko|thulajreyoko]] || [[word:julajreyoko|julajreyoko]] || [[word:shulajreyoko|shulajreyoko]] || [[word:kulajreyoko|kulajreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelajreyoko|thelajreyoko]] || [[word:jelajreyoko|jelajreyoko]] || [[word:shelajreyoko|shelajreyoko]] || [[word:kelajreyoko|kelajreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholajreyoko|thotholajreyoko]] || [[word:jojolajreyoko|jojolajreyoko]] || [[word:shosholajreyoko|shosholajreyoko]] || [[word:kokolajreyoko|kokolajreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajreyoko|tholajreyoko]] || [[word:jolajreyoko|jolajreyoko]] || [[word:sholajreyoko|sholajreyoko]] || [[word:kolajreyoko|kolajreyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajreyoko|tholajreyoko]] || [[word:jolajreyoko|jolajreyoko]] || [[word:sholajreyoko|sholajreyoko]] || [[word:kolajreyoko|kolajreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlajreyoko|thĂŠlajreyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlajreyoko|jĂŠlajreyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlajreyoko|shĂŠlajreyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlajreyoko|kĂŠlajreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalajreyoko|thathalajreyoko]] || [[word:jajalajreyoko|jajalajreyoko]] || [[word:shashalajreyoko|shashalajreyoko]] || [[word:kakalajreyoko|kakalajreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalajreyoko|thalajreyoko]] || [[word:jalajreyoko|jalajreyoko]] || [[word:shalajreyoko|shalajreyoko]] || [[word:kalajreyoko|kalajreyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalajreyoko|thalajreyoko]] || [[word:jalajreyoko|jalajreyoko]] || [[word:shalajreyoko|shalajreyoko]] || [[word:kalajreyoko|kalajreyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
